    Method
    Description
    static Optional<ReportCriteria>
    ReportCriteriaDialog.showDialog(javafx.stage.Window parentWindow, String dialogTitle, List<Fund> availableFunds, ChartOfAccounts chartOfAccounts, DateSelectionMode dateMode, boolean showFundSelector, boolean showAccountSelector, ReportConfiguration initialConfig)
    Displays a dialog for the user to input report criteria.
    static Optional<ReportCriteria>
    ReportCriteriaDialog.showDialog(javafx.stage.Window parentWindow, String title, List<Fund> availableFunds, DateSelectionMode dateMode, boolean showFundSelector)
    Shows the report criteria dialog with options for date selection and fund selection.
    static Optional<ReportCriteria>
    ReportCriteriaDialog.showDialog(javafx.stage.Window parentWindow, String title, List<Fund> availableFunds, DateSelectionMode dateMode, boolean showFundSelector, ReportConfiguration initialConfig)
    Shows the report criteria dialog with options for date selection, fund selection, and pre-populating with an initial configuration.
